===Pokémon Generations===
[[File:Archie PG.png|thumb|250px|Archie in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Archie made an appearance in ''[[PG08|The Cavern]]''. He, along with some [[Team Aqua]] [[Team Aqua Grunt (Trainer class)|Grunts]], were seen exploring the [[Seafloor Cavern]] in search of {{p|Kyogre}}. When it was eventually found, Archie used the [[Blue Orb]] to awaken Kyogre's [[Primal Reversion|Primal]] form, against [[Shelly]]'s wishes. He was last seen aboard the [[Submarine Explorer 1]] with Shelly, being attacked by Primal Kyogre.
